sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52209" key="kakoqigi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰκο-θῐγία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">θιγγάνω</etym>) <sense id="n52209.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">aimlessness</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">γνώμης</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0161.tlg001:223" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Democr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">223</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
